greeting: Welcome to Medic-Aid. How can we help you today?
status_ready: ✅ Your request has been processed successfully.
status_need_info: ℹ️ We need a bit more information to assist you.
status_escalate: 🚨 Your request has been escalated to our medical staff.
hitl_prompt: Staff Review: Please approve or edit the draft response below.
hitl_approved: Response approved and sent to patient.

prep_instructions.cardiology: For your cardiac stress test: Avoid caffeine for 24 hours before. Wear comfortable clothing. Do not eat 3 hours before the test.
prep_instructions.radiology: For your MRI/scan: Remove all metal objects. Inform us of any implants. Arrive 15 minutes early. You may be asked to fast for 4 hours.
prep_instructions.dental: For your dental procedure: Brush and floss before arriving. If sedation is involved, arrange a driver. Avoid eating 2 hours before.
prep_instructions.general: No special preparation needed. Please bring your health card and any current medications.
prep_instructions.orthopedics: For your orthopedic appointment: Bring any X-rays or imaging done in the past year. Wear loose clothing for easy limb access.

reschedule_confirm: Your appointment for {dept} has been rescheduled to {date} at {time}.
cancel_confirm: Your appointment for {dept} on {date} has been successfully cancelled.
not_found: We could not find an appointment matching your details. Please verify your Patient ID.
emergency_message: ⚠️ This sounds like a medical emergency. Please call 911 or go to your nearest emergency room immediately. Do NOT wait for an appointment.
